content.en:
"Ancestor, why do you say this?"

Ye Tian pretended to be confused and asked rhetorically.

Xingzu said coldly: "Xu Chen, Donghe and Gu Shen have either fallen, or they have been imprisoned by you, what do you want to do?"

When Xingzu said this, it was tantamount to tearing his face.

Ye Tian couldn't continue to pretend to be confused, so he said: "Xingzu, since you know, then I won't hide it, yes, these supreme beings in Donghe have been killed by me." "

"Why?"

Xingzu didn't have any sadness, only anger.

"I want to completely control the Ancient Star Clan, they will get in my way!" Ye Tiandao.

"Ridiculous!" Star Ancestor sneered: "Are you so short-sighted, if you have been stranded in the Star Ancient Domain, and without my guidance, you will not be able to become a top powerhouse at all, and you will not even be able to get out of the Star Ancient Domain, is it possible that you want to stay in the Star Ancient Domain for the rest of your life?"

"The Star Ancient Domain is very good, it's not as dangerous as the outside world, why not stay here?"

Ye Tian asked rhetorically.

“......"

Xingzu was angry, he had never seen such a supreme person who was so content with the status quo and unmotivated, and Xu Chen's talent was so good, even if he took the original source liquid, the future potential was still very great.

As everyone knows, Ye Tian is fooling him.

If it weren't for the squeezing of the last bit of benefit, he was afraid that he would directly annihilate this part of the Star Ancestor's consciousness.

abrupt

Xingzu said, "Xu Chen, do you think that you have been living in the Star Ancient Domain, eternal and immortal?"

Ye Tian heard the ridicule in Xingzu's words, and couldn't help asking: "Why not, we have an infinite lifespan, and the Star Ancient Domain also exists forever, and the supreme from the outside world can't enter the Star Ancient Domain, who is my opponent?"

"Hahahaha!!!" Xingzu laughed wildly, "You are too naïve, you do have an eternal life, but it doesn't mean that no one can enter the Xingchen Ancient Domain, the Xingchen Ancient Domain is the prison that imprisons me, the half-step Eternal Realm that imprisoned me has not fallen, if he comes back, he will definitely not mind erasing you when he sees you." After a long time, it is very likely that he has already set foot in the Eternal Realm, do you think you can compete with an Eternal Realm?"

"Who is that half-step Eternal Realm that imprisoned you?"

Ye Tian was a little curious.

Xingzu recalled that Eternal Realm, his face was a little ugly, and he did not reveal the identity of the other party.

Xingzu just reminded: "Xu Chen, if you help me break the seal, the prohibition of the Xingchen Ancient Domain will disappear, and then you can leave the Xingchen Ancient Domain. "

Ye Tian pretended to be contemplative, but he didn't panic at all in his heart.

This is just a clone, and he is not afraid of falling.

"I'll help you, what's the benefit?Although you gave me a lot of good things before, you also cheated me, the original source liquid will consume potential, you think I don't know?" Ye Tian revealed directly.

"You even know about the defects of the original source solution?"

Xingzu was a little surprised.

The Star Ancient Domain has no connection with the outside world, and the Primordial Source Liquid is very rare, so the Supreme in the Star Ancient Domain should not know about it!

However, he didn't think too much about it.

Since Ye Tian had discovered the defect of the original source liquid, he didn't hide it.

"Xu Chen, the Primordial Source Liquid is indeed a bit regrettable, but it is still a treasure coveted by countless supremes, and that flaw is not worth mentioning at all in terms of its own value. Xingzu said.

"I won't help you out without other great benefits. Ye Tian said.

"If I give you a great benefit, what if you don't help me then?"

Xingzu said.

"Believe it or not!" Ye Tian said indifferently.

Xingzu's face changed many times, and finally said: "I want to sign a contract with you, and I will send a special contract stone later, and if you break the contract, you will suffer unimaginable consequences." "

"What contract stone?"

Ye Tian was surprised, what other contract could bind the Supreme?

"Spirit Source Contract Stone!"

Xingzu said.

Hall of Void Source.

Ye Tian asked the machine spirit about the situation of the Spirit Source Contract Stone.

"Machine Spirit, do you know the Spirit Source Contract Stone?" Ye Tian asked.

"Know!" Ji Ling said: "Strictly speaking, the Spirit Source Contract Stone is an eternal source object, but at the beginning of the Source Sea, this Eternal Source was shattered and turned into fragments, and each fragment is equivalent to the Spirit Source Contract Stone, this kind of contract stone can restrain the supreme, but it is ineffective against the half-step Eternal Realm. "

"If my clone signs a contract with the Spirit Source Contract Stone, will the contract affect my body?" Ye Tian wanted to know this, so he asked.

"It can't be affected!" Star Ancestor replied: "For the Supreme One with a special clone, the Spirit Source Contract Stone cannot have an effect, which is also one of its defects, the reason why the Spirit Source Contract Stone can affect the Supreme One is that it will release a special energy pouring into the Supreme One's body, and it will completely merge with the Supreme One, regardless of each other, once it is violated, the Supreme One will suffer the consequences of the oath." But the master's doppelganger is not the same body as the master, so it will naturally not be affected. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood, so he didn't worry about this so-called Spirit Source Contract Stone.

......

The Ancient Realm of the Stars.

"Yes, I agreed!"

Ye Tian said.

"Okay, I'll send the Spirit Source Contract Stone!"

Bang!!!!!

The Star Ancient Domain began to shake, and it was the Star Ancestor who spent his strength to send the Spirit Source Contract Stone out of the Sealed Land.

Tear and pull!

A hole cracked in the void, and a blue stone fell out, which was the Spirit Source Contract Stone.

"Xuchen, let's sign a contract!"

Star Ancestor demanded.

"No problem!" Ye Tian nodded.

Then, the two signed a contract.

This contract was formulated by Xingzu, it was very strict, and Ye Tian was invited to rescue Xingzu, if he didn't save Xingzu when he had strength, then Ye Tian would not only be unable to advance in strength, but would even suffer the pain of backlash until one day his body collapsed and died.

I have to say that such an oath is very cruel, but Ye Tian signed it.

When it was signed, Xingzu breathed a sigh of relief and laughed.

Obviously, he thought he would be able to break through the seal.

"It's time to give me benefits, right?I've signed a contract, it's impossible to break the contract, you have to really cultivate me!!" Ye Tian demanded.

"Okay, I'll give you a great chance right now!"

Xingzu assured.
